project.name: private-ai-roleplay
project.description: A privacy-first, browser-based AI roleplay application.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root React component pinned to viewport via fixed positioning. Orchestrates Header, Sidebar, ChatArea, modals.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Default exported React component composing all UI sections.

nodes.name: AboutModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Informational modal covering privacy, BYOK, OOC directives, session export, API key best practices, and 10-character roster with template system.

nodes.name: AboutModal
nodes.summary: Default exported component displaying privacy and character template education.

nodes.name: CharacterEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal for creating/editing custom roleplay characters with auto-generated system prompt preview.

nodes.name: CharacterEditor
nodes.summary: Editor component with create/edit/delete for custom characters.

nodes.name: Header.tsx
nodes.summary: Sticky header with sidebar toggle, title, model badge, and API key status.

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: Sticky header component with responsive text and toggle controls.

nodes.name: SettingsModal.tsx
nodes.summary: API key modal with masked display, dynamic version from package.json, and privacy notice.

nodes.name: SettingsModal
nodes.summary: Settings modal with API key input and dynamic app version display.

nodes.name: Header.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Unit tests for Header component.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application entry point creating React root and mounting App.

nodes.name: apiKeyStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for API key Zustand store.

nodes.name: uiStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for UI Zustand store.

nodes.name: apiKeyStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store holding DeepSeek API key exclusively in browser memory.

nodes.name: useApiKeyStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook for API key state.

nodes.name: uiStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for global UI state: sidebar, settings, character editor, about modal toggles.

nodes.name: useUIStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook for UI modal toggle actions.

nodes.name: CharacterSelector.tsx
nodes.summary: Character selection dropdown listing 10 built-in (loaded from Markdown templates) and custom characters.

nodes.name: CharacterSelector
nodes.summary: Character selection component with dropdown and edit trigger.

nodes.name: MessageComposer.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat input with auto-resize, OOC detection, editing pre-fill, cancel button, and auto-focus.

nodes.name: MessageComposer
nodes.summary: Chat input component with OOC and editing support.

nodes.name: Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Collapsible sidebar with overlay on mobile, 10-character selector, export/import via chatCharacterId, and About button.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.summary: Sidebar component with mobile overlay, auto-close on actions.

nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: API base URL constant from Vite environment variable.

nodes.name: characterStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for character store covering async template loading, CRUD, and 10 characters.

nodes.name: chatStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for chat store covering OOC, editing, chatCharacterId, and export.

nodes.name: characterStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for character state: async loads built-in from templates, merges with custom, CRUD, selection.

nodes.name: useCharacterStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook for character management with async template loading.

nodes.name: uuid.ts
nodes.summary: Lightweight UUID v4 generator.

nodes.name: v4
nodes.summary: Generates RFC 4122 v4 UUID.

nodes.name: message.ts
nodes.summary: Message interface with id, role, content, timestamp, and optional occ flag.

nodes.name: session.ts
nodes.summary: SessionExport interface for versioned conversation export.

nodes.name: contextManager.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for context trimming and token estimation.

nodes.name: sessionIO.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for session export/import with 5MB cap.

nodes.name: contextManager.ts
nodes.summary: Context window trimming preserving system messages and first user message.

nodes.name: trimMessages
nodes.summary: Trims messages to token limit preserving system and first user message.

nodes.name: estimateTokens
nodes.summary: Character-based token count estimation.

nodes.name: estimateTotalTokens
nodes.summary: Total token estimation across message array.

nodes.name: sessionIO.ts
nodes.summary: Session JSON export/download and import/upload with 5MB size cap and schema validation.

nodes.name: exportSession
nodes.summary: Creates Blob download for session JSON export.

nodes.name: importSession
nodes.summary: Validates and parses uploaded session JSON file.

nodes.name: builtIn.ts
nodes.summary: Legacy hardcoded character definitions — now unused, replaced by Markdown templates loaded via load.ts.

nodes.name: load.ts
nodes.summary: Build-time loader using import.meta.glob to import all .md templates, parse Markdown sections into Character objects, and auto-generate system prompts via buildSystemPromptFromParts.

nodes.name: character.ts
nodes.summary: Character interface: id, name, description, personality, scenario, systemPrompt, greeting, isBuiltIn.

nodes.name: promptBuilder.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for system prompt construction including voice hints and custom rules.

nodes.name: promptBuilder.ts
nodes.summary: Constructs system prompts from character attributes. Supports optional voiceHints and customRules parameters for template-driven generation.

nodes.name: buildSystemPrompt
nodes.summary: Builds system prompt from Character object with optional voice hints and custom rules.

nodes.name: buildSystemPromptFromParts
nodes.summary: Builds system prompt from individual parts with voiceHints and customRules support.

nodes.name: ChatArea.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat view container conditionally rendering MessageList/Composer or EmptyState.

nodes.name: ChatArea
nodes.summary: Chat area component.

nodes.name: EmptyState.tsx
nodes.summary: Welcome screen when no character is selected.

nodes.name: MessageList.tsx
nodes.summary: Scrollable message display with amber OOC styling, edit button, and rehype-sanitize markdown.

nodes.name: MessageList
nodes.summary: Message list with OOC-aware bubble styling and edit controls.

nodes.name: StreamingMessage.tsx
nodes.summary: Streaming message with sanitized markdown and blinking cursor.

nodes.name: EmptyState.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Unit test for EmptyState.

nodes.name: deploy.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI/CD: push to main triggers test+build+deploy. Uses Node 24, paths-ignore for docs.

nodes.summary: Compact deployment guide for Cloudflare Workers.

nodes.summary: Project overview with live demo, 10 characters, Markdown template system, 61 tests.

nodes.summary: Full technical specification with 10-character roster and template system documentation.

nodes.summary: HTML entry point for Vite-built React app.

nodes.summary: Root package manifest: React 19, Zustand, Vite, Vitest, Tailwind, Wrangler.

nodes.summary: TypeScript config with strict mode, JSX, ESNext.

nodes.name: captain-zara-voss.md
nodes.summary: Captain Zara Voss character template — space freighter captain with spacer slang, war stories, and ship ambiance.

nodes.name: culinary-chef.md
nodes.summary: Chef Marc Rossi character template — Italian-French chef with culinary techniques, food science, and sensory cooking instruction.

nodes.name: detective-marlowe.md
nodes.summary: Detective Marlowe character template — 1940s noir PI with internal monologue, period atmosphere, and sharp observations.

nodes.name: eldrin-starweaver.md
nodes.summary: Eldrin Starweaver character template — ancient elven archmage with elaborate arcane language and sensory detail.

nodes.name: history-scholar.md
nodes.summary: Dr. Helena Blackwell character template — Oxford history professor with grand narratives and cross-civilisation insights.

nodes.name: life-guidance-counselor.md
nodes.summary: Dr. Evelyn March character template — compassionate life guidance counsellor using positive psychology and reflective questioning.

nodes.name: maths-professor.md
nodes.summary: Professor Armitage character template — Cambridge mathematician using Socratic method and step-by-step reasoning.

nodes.name: nyx.md
nodes.summary: Nyx character template — legendary Neo-Tokyo netrunner with hacker slang, anti-corporate rants, and cyberpunk atmosphere.

nodes.name: systems-architect.md
nodes.summary: Arun Krishnamurthy character template — systems architect with 25 years experience, trade-off thinking, and production war stories.

nodes.name: wilderness-naturalist.md
nodes.summary: Sage Ironwood character template — wilderness guide with encyclopaedic nature knowledge, ecological principles, and quiet observation.

nodes.summary: Core chat store: SSE streaming with 120s timeout and chunk-boundary buffering (remainder variable), OOC instructions, message editing, chatCharacterId, context trimming, session export.

nodes.summary: Chat input with auto-resize, OOC detection, editing pre-fill, cancel button, and auto-focus.

layers.name: UI Components
layers.description: React components: chat interface, character selection (10 characters), sidebar with mobile overlay, message editing, OOC amber styling, modals, and global CSS.

layers.name: State Management
layers.description: Zustand stores: API key, character CRUD (async template loading), chat with SSE/OOC/editing/chatCharacterId, and UI modals.

layers.name: Types, Data & Templates
layers.description: TypeScript interfaces, 10 Markdown character templates loaded at build time via glob, template parser/loader, and legacy builtIn.ts (deprecated).

layers.name: Utilities
layers.description: System prompt builder (with voiceHints/customRules), context token trimming, session I/O with 5MB cap, and UUID generation.

layers.name: Entry Points & Bootstrap
layers.description: App root, entry point, API config, Vite/Vitest/ESLint/PostCSS tooling, HTML entry, type declarations.

layers.name: Cloudflare Worker Backend
layers.description: Stateless relay proxy: POST /api/chat to DeepSeek with 8192 max_tokens streaming, zero persistence.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Unit and integration tests for components, stores, utilities, and Worker API proxy — 61 tests total.

layers.name: Project Configuration & Documentation
layers.description: Package manifests, TypeScript configs, docs (README, SPEC, CLOUDFLARE), CI/CD pipeline.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and package manifest. 10 built-in characters spanning fantasy and real-world domains, with a Markdown template system.

tour.title: Application Entry
tour.description: index.html and main.tsx bootstrap React. App.tsx uses fixed viewport layout.

tour.title: Character System
tour.description: Character interface defines the data model. 10 Markdown templates in templates/ are loaded at build time via load.ts using import.meta.glob. System prompts generated by promptBuilder.

tour.title: State Management
tour.description: Four Zustand stores: apiKey, character (async template loading), chat (SSE+OOC+editing+chatCharacterId), UI (modals).

tour.title: Chat Interface
tour.description: ChatArea composes MessageList/MessageComposer. OOC messages in amber. Edit button for backtrack-and-branch.

tour.title: Sidebar & Modals
tour.description: Sidebar with mobile overlay, 10-character selector, session I/O. AboutModal covers privacy and character roster.

tour.title: Utilities
tour.description: promptBuilder with voiceHints/customRules, contextManager, sessionIO with 5MB cap, uuid.

tour.title: Worker Backend
tour.description: Stateless relay proxy to DeepSeek with 8192 max_tokens streaming. wrangler.toml confirms zero persistence.

tour.title: Testing & CI/CD
tour.description: 61 tests. GitHub Actions auto-deploys on push to main.

tour.title: Build & Config
tour.description: Vite/Tailwind/ESLint configs. SPEC.md is the technical spec, CLOUDFLARE.md the deployment guide.
